ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the agent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the agent */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location where the agent is currently located (e.g., House, Shop) */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the agent's current location */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Current activity of the agent (e.g., House, Visit, Shop) */,
  "infected_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the agent is infected or not */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Overall health status of the agent (e.g., healthy, symptomatic, asymptomatic) */,
  "infection_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent was first infected */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent recovered */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the agent (e.g., not vaccinated, partially vaccinated, fully vaccinated) */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Recent travel history of the agent */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for reaching out to the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "infected_agent_id" TEXT /* ID of the infected agent */,
  "responsible_agent_id" TEXT /* ID of the agent responsible for the infection */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location where the interaction occurred */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the interaction location */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity during which the interaction occurred */,
  "tick" INTEGER /* Tick (time) of the interaction */,
  "iso8601" TEXT /* ISO 8601 timestamp of the interaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "proximity" TEXT /* Proximity between the agents during the interaction (e.g., close, moderate, distant) */,
  "mask_wearing" TEXT /* Mask wearing status during the interaction (e.g., both, one, none) */,
  "transmission_probability" REAL /* Estimated probability of transmission based on the interaction details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_responsible_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_infected_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("infected_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_traces" (
  "trace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact trace */,
  "agent_id" TEXT /* ID of the agent */,
  "contact_agent_id" TEXT /* ID of the agent that came into contact with the agent */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location where the contact occurred */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the contact location */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity during which the contact occurred */,
  "tick" INTEGER /* Tick (time) of the contact */,
  "iso8601" TEXT /* ISO 8601 timestamp of the contact */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the contact */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the contact in minutes */,
  "proximity" TEXT /* Proximity between the agents during the contact (e.g., close, moderate, distant) */,
  "mask_wearing" TEXT /* Mask wearing status during the contact (e.g., both, one, none) */,
  "transmission_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the contact resulted in transmission (e.g., Yes, No, Unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_traces_contact_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_traces_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)
